title: Ctenopteris meridensis
taxonomy: Ctenopteris meridensis is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This family is part of the order Polypodiales and the division Pteridophyta. The classification of Ctenopteris meridensis is further supported by its morphological characteristics, which include its frond and leaflet structure. The specific classification of Ctenopteris meridensis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Dryopteridaceae, Genus: Ctenopteris, Species: C. meridensis. Further research is necessary to confirm the accuracy of this classification.
